name_cn:
🎉New Arrival 1BB148🎉🎉
This top-handle bag made of natural grained leather reinterprets a soft silhouette, can be carried by hand or worn with a detachable shoulder strap, comes with 2 removable charms. Metal hardware. Embossed letter logo on the front, zip closure, with two pockets, one with a zipper, large capacity, a timeless bestseller. Get yours now🎉
